metrics.top_terms: lean, product, s_eff, χ_local, s_prod, factor, test, proves, version, narrowproducttest, codex, this, narrow, master, equation

sections.title: Purpose
sections.text:
This package contains the Codex Lean 4 work for the narrow Master Equation
product test only.
It does not attempt to prove theology.
It proves formal product behavior.

sections.title: Main Deliverables
sections.text:
- `CorrectedEntropyKernel.lean`
Standalone Lean kernel proving the abstract entropy-attenuation structure.
- `TheophysicsProductionKernel.lean`
Existing production kernel preserved for comparison.
- `narrow_product_test/`

sections.title: Small Mathlib-backed Lean project for the concrete product test using
Narrow Product Test
sections.text: The Mathlib project tests two versions:

sections.title: Local product:
sections.text: `χ_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C`

sections.title: Lean proves:
sections.text:
- `S_eff > 0`
- `S_eff ≤ 1` when `η > 0` and `S_prod ≥ 0`
- `S_eff` decreases as `S_prod` increases
- `R = 0 -> χ_local = 0`
- zero in any multiplicative factor except `S_eff` forces `χ_local = 0`
- `χ_local > 0` only with the added sign condition `M > 0`
- monotonicity in `G` and antitonicity in `S_prod` require `M ≥ 0`
It also includes explicit counterexamples showing what fails when `M < 0`.

sections.title: Local product:
sections.text: `χ_local = G * M_eff * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C`

sections.title: Lean proves the same structural facts more cleanly because every multiplicative
sections.text: factor is nonnegative under the stated bounds.

sections.title: Key Lean File
sections.text:
- `narrow_product_test/NarrowProductTest/Basic.lean`
This is the main concrete proof file for the A/B comparison.

sections.title: Verification
sections.text:
These checks passed:
- `lake env lean NarrowProductTest/Basic.lean`
- `lake env lean NarrowProductTest.lean`

sections.title: Recommendation
sections.text:
Version B is the cleaner formalization target for the Master Equation product
layer because it removes the sign-instability caused by raw signed `M`.

equations: `χ_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C`
- zero in any multiplicative factor except `S_eff` forces `χ_local = 0`
`χ_local = G * M_eff * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C`

claims.one_sentence_claim: This package contains the Codex Lean 4 work for the narrow Master Equation product test only.
claims.forward_test: If the claim is true, the stated relationship should preserve its variables, direction, and scope.
claims.reverse_test: If the pattern can appear without the proposed framework, the claim should be downgraded or narrowed.
claims.kill_conditions: Needs an explicit failure case: what observation, logic result, or counterexample would make this claim false?
claims.not_claimed: Does not by itself claim that physics proves theology.
claims.proof_boundary: Current boundary: deterministic pass classifies this as Formal Model, not a final proof.
